MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPERANCES: ALAN HORWITZ FOR PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC. ALAN HORWITZ AUTHORIZED TO ACT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY MOLLY STAFFORD FOR DEFENDANT EDWARD WANG AND MAIRI MCGEEVER FOR DEFENDANT JEFFREY GROW

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD.CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. STIPULATION FILED AS TO JEFFREY GROW. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AS TO EDWARD WANG PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT WANG TO CONTINUE TENANCY FOR 12 MONTHS FROM TODAY'S DATE. DEFENDANT GROW TO VACATE BY 11/23/05. GROW PERMITTED TO VISIT 9AM - 6PM, 3 TIMES A WEEK. FAMILY MEMBERS AND GUESTS OF WANG TO ABIDE BY TERMS OF LEASE. WANG TO CONTACT PAWS ASSISTANCE FOR HIS 4 PETS. WANG TO PAY $3300 BY 11/10/05 BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. STARTING 1/4/06 DEFENDANT TO INCLUDE $50 WITH RENT BY THE 4TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL $600 HAS BEEN PAID. IF WANG TRANSFERS TO A SMALLER, LESS EXPENSIVE UNIT, THE $50 PAYMENT WILL BE INCREASED TO $100. IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES, ANY PAYMENTS STILL DUE, WILL BE WAIVED. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES HIS TENANCY WILL BE REINSTATED IN GOOD STANDING. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION, RENT, DAMAGES, AND ATTORNEY FEES, LESS ANY CREDITS. PLAINTIFF TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION WITH 96 HOURS NOTICE. IF DEFENDANT MOVES TO ANOTHER UNIT, JUDGMENT CAN BE ENTERED FOR THE NEW ADDRESS. ALL PARTIES AGREE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN DOCUMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILL CHEN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:YVONNE LEE (218)
